opportunity.title: SysNav – An Intelligent Cockpit for DevOps (Local-First)
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: One thing teams discover is that local-first with LLMs creates real sync headaches when you need to reference remote state - you can't reliably snapshot the entire container registry or cloud config into local context without hitting token limits or accuracy issues. Another hard lesson: self-improving loops in production tooling quickly become their own risk surface if they can modify their own command handlers - I've seen agents accidentally rewrite their own tool definitions and corrupt their runtime environment.
actions.reasoning: I have built multi-provider LLM agent systems with local-first architecture and terminal tooling, including tool orchestration frameworks and self-improving agent loops for DevOps workflows.
